body: ## [1.8.14](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v1.8.13...v1.8.14) (2016-11-03) ### Bug Fixes * **slider:** avoid multi touch issues (#1501) ([0b8a242](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/0b8a242)), closes [#1186](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/1186)
